creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145888
patch for updating port

- Update to 0.46.
- Remove dialog about docs, and remove installing of README etc,
   as those are covered in the MAN, which is installed anyway.
- Take maintainership.

Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Spiffy > p5-Spiffy.log
